zh.lifeSummary: 當Rachel Robinson於1835年出生在美國喬治亞時，她的父親James L Robinson15歲，母親Sarah25歲。她於1850年7月10日與Littleberry "L.B." Bray在美國喬治亞素特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她於1850年住在美國喬治亞素特素特且於1860年住在美國喬治亞度利。

zh-hans.Sumter county, Sumter, Georgia: 美国乔治亚州素特素特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rachel Robinson于1835年出生在美国乔治亚州时，她的父亲James L Robinson15岁，母亲Sarah25岁。她于1850年7月10日与Littleberry "L.B." Bray在美国乔治亚州素特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她于1850年住在美国乔治亚州素特素特且于1860年住在美国乔治亚州度利。

nameMeanings.name: Robinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Robin , a pet form of Robert , + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
French: from a pet form of the personal name   Robin  .

West Indian (including Haiti) and Guyanese: most likely not (only) of English or French origin as in 1 above and 2 above, but also, if not mostly, from the related name of the famous Daniel Defoe's literary character Robinson Crusoe (from a novel first published in 1719).

variants.name: Robbinson
meanings: Altered form of English or French   Robinson  .

variants.name: Robin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Andre, Emile, Marcel, Achille, Armand, Arnaud, Camille, Julien, Michel, Normand.
French, Breton, Scottish, English, and German: from the personal name Robin, a pet form of Robert , composed of the short form Rob + the hypocoristic suffix -in.
Slovenian: topographic name derived from rob ‘edge, border’ (see Robar ).

nameMeanings.name: Rachel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘ewe’ in Hebrew), borne by the beloved wife of Jacob and mother (after long barrenness) of Joseph (Genesis 28–35) and of Benjamin, at whose birth she died. In the Middle Ages and subsequently this was regarded as a characteristically Jewish name, but it is now also popular among Gentiles.

variants.name: Rachelle
meanings: Elaborated form of   Rachel  , as if from French, but actually a recent coinage in English.

historicEvents.title: Remember the Alamo
historicEvents.description: Being a monumental event in the Texas Revolution, The Battle of the Alamo was a thirteen-day battle at the Alamo Mission near San Antonio. In the early morning of the final battle, the Mexican Army advanced on the Alamo. Quickly being overrun, the Texian Soldiers quickly withdrew inside the building. The battle has often been overshadowed by events from the Mexican–American War, But the Alamo gradually became known as a national battle site and later named an official Texas State Shrine.
Historical Boundaries: 1856: Sumter, Georgia, United States

historicEvents.title: The First Civil Rights Act
historicEvents.description: The first federal law that defined what was citizenship and affirm that all citizens are equally protected by the law. Its main objective was to protect the civil rights of persons of African descent.

historicEvents.title: The Last Public Hanging in Georgia
historicEvents.description: The last public hanging in Georgia was on September 28, 1893. The General Assembly prohibited public executions in December 1893. Prior to this law, Georgians commonly traveled to witness scheduled public executions.

historicEvents.title: Plessy vs. Ferguson
historicEvents.description: A landmark decision of the U.S. Supreme Court upholding the constitutionality of racial segregation laws for public facilities if the segregated facilities were equal in quality. It's widely regarded as one of the worst decisions in U.S. Supreme Court history.

historicEvents.title: The Atlanta Race Riot
historicEvents.description: The Atlanta Race Riot of 1906 occurred on the evening of September 22 through September 24. A newspaper reported the rapes of four white women by African American men. Fueled by pre-existing racial tensions, these reports enraged white men who then arranged gangs to attack African American men. Over the next few days, several thousand white men joined in and in the end, 26 people were killed and many were injured.
Charles Lindbergh makes the first solo nonstop transatlantic flight in his plane The Spirit of St. Louis.

historicEvents.title: Germans Sink Ships Near St. Simons Island
historicEvents.description: Lights from homes along the coast of St. Simons Island provided a clear view of the SS Oklahoma for German U-boat Captain Reinhard Hardegen on April 8, 1942. A German torpedo was fired at the SS Oklahoma shortly after midnight. An hour later, a second torpedo was fired at the oil tanker Esso Baton Rouge. Both ships sunk and the attacks left 22 seamen dead. After the incident, residents of the Golden Isles panicked over concern of a German Invasion of the coast and were stringently observant of a nighttime blackout.

en.lifeSummary: When Rachel Robinson was born in 1835, in Georgia, United States, her father, James L Robinson, was 15 and her mother, Sarah, was 25. She married Littleberry "L.B." Bray on 10 July 1850, in Sumter, Georgia, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She lived in Sumter, Sumter, Georgia, United States in 1850 and Dooly, Georgia, United States in 1860.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rachel Robinson est née en 1835, à Géorgie, États-Unis, son père, James L Robinson, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Sarah, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Littleberry "L.B." Bray le 10 juillet 1850, à Sumter, Géorgie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle a vécu à Sumter, Sumter, Géorgie, États-Unis en 1850 et à Dooly, Géorgie, États-Unis en 1860.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rachel Robinson 1835 in Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James L Robinson 15 und ihre Mutter Sarah 25. Sie hat am 10. Juli 1850 in Sumter, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten Littleberry "L.B." Bray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1850 hat sie in Sumter, Sumter, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten und 1860 in Dooly, Georgia, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt.

ja.lifeSummary: Rachel Robinsonが1835年にアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州で生まれた時，父James L Robinsonは15歳，母Sarahは25歳であった。1850年7月10日にアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州スムターでLittleberry "L.B." Brayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州スムタースムターに，1860年にはアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州ドオリーに住んでいた。

ko.lifeSummary: Rachel Robinson(이)가 1835년 미국 조지아 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James L Robinson(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1850년 7월 10일 미국 조지아 주 수터에서 Littleberry "L.B." Bray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 조지아 주 수터 수터에서, 1860년도에 미국 조지아 주 도리에서 살았다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rachel Robinson родилась в 1835 г. в местности Джорджия, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени James L Robinson было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Littleberry "L.B." Bray 10 июля 1850 г. в местности сумтир, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она жила в местности сумтир, сумтир, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году и в местности дули, Джорджия, Соединенные штаты в 1860 году.
